query.query_string: Budesonide AND polyp of frontal sinus

data.query: Budesonide AND polyp of frontal sinus

results.title: Effects of systemic steroid treatment in chronic polypoid rhinosinusitis evaluated with magnetic resonance imaging.
results.abstract: The aim of this prospective study was to evaluate the efficacy of a combined (local and systemic) steroid therapy on the extent of chronic polypoid rhinosinusitis and patient symptoms.
results.journal: Otolaryngology--head and neck surgery : official journal of American Academy of Otolaryngology-Head and Neck Surgery

results.title: [Effects of postoperative care on wound healing after endonasal paranasal sinus surgery].
results.abstract: There is no standard for postoperative care after paranasal sinus surgery.
